query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_orders,
  SUM(CASE WHEN shippedAt IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_shipped_at,
  SUM(CASE WHEN shippedAt IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_shipped_at,
  SUM(CASE WHEN isShipped = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as is_shipped_true
FROM orders LIMIT 1;

  SUM(CASE WHEN shippedAt IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_shipped_at,
  SUM(CASE WHEN shippedAt IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_shipped_at,
